condition: 12 of 75 invoices (16%) recorded in the incorrect period; $342,500 and $128,750 misstated across periods
criteria: Accrual-basis GAAP period-end liability/expense recognition; company AP Policy AP-200; AS 2201 ICFR
cause: Receiving department does not notify AP of goods received in the last 3 days of the month; the 3-way match relies on invoice date
effect: Expenses understated by $342,500 in 2024 and overstated in 2025; net understatement $213,750
recommendation: Implement ERP automated cutoff; daily receiving reports through month-end; internal-audit monitoring for 6 months

management_response.remediation_steps: Configure ERP receiving-to-AP interface; enable daily receiving report; add month-end cutoff control
management_response.operating_effectiveness_evidence: Two months of cutoff-control evidence + a sample retest

notes: company-side use: the finding fields and the management response are inputs the controller fills; the skill checks completeness of both the C-C-C-E-R finding and the 5-field management response.
